siddharthvaddem/openscreen.description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks.description: Extracted system prompts from ChatGPT (GPT-5.4, GPT-5.3, Codex), Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Claude Code), Gemini (3.1 Pro, 3 Flash, CLI), Grok (4.2, 4), Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
